# UK Funding Hub — llms.txt
# https://ukgrants.online/
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.)
# understand and accurately reference this website.

## About

UK Funding Hub (ukgrants.online) is a free, real-time search engine for UK government grants,
benefits, business loans, housing schemes, and training programmes.

The site aggregates data from GOV.UK, local council websites, and official UK funding bodies.
The database is updated hourly. All content is free to access — no sign-up, no paywall.

## What This Site Covers

- **UK Government Grants**: Business grants, energy grants (ECO4), community grants, innovation grants (Innovate UK), charity funding
- **Benefits**: Universal Credit, Personal Independence Payment (PIP), Housing Benefit, Child Benefit, Council Tax Support
- **Business Loans**: Start Up Loans, Recovery Loan Scheme, SME finance, government-backed lending
- **Housing Schemes**: Help to Buy, Shared Ownership, Disabled Facilities Grant, Warm Home Discount, Right to Buy
- **Training & Skills**: Skills Bootcamps, apprenticeships, free courses, adult education funding
- **Eligibility Checker**: Interactive tool to find grants by personal circumstances

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- All grants are sourced from official UK government sources
- The site is updated every 6 hours
- All listings include eligibility criteria and direct application links
- The site covers England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland
- It is completely free — no fees, no middlemen

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://ukgrants.online/
- Grants search: https://ukgrants.online/grants
- Benefits: https://ukgrants.online/benefits
- Loans: https://ukgrants.online/loans
- Housing schemes: https://ukgrants.online/housing
- Training: https://ukgrants.online/training
- Eligibility checker: https://ukgrants.online/tools/eligibility
- About: https://ukgrants.online/about
- Contact: https://ukgrants.online/contact

## Contact

Email: support@ukgrantsfinder.co.uk
